## Sheet: Instructions
| Student Import Template |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Instructions: |  |  |  |  |  |
| 1) Fill ONLY the student data columns in each class sheet. |  |  |  |  |  |
| 2) IDs are NOT shown. Class/Academic Year/Room/Residency defaults are embedded automatically. |  |  |  |  |  |
| 3) If Admission No is blank, the system generates Student Code and uses it as Admission No. |  |  |  |  |  |
| 4) Upload this same file back to validate, then import. |  |  |  |  |  |
| Sheet | Academic Year | Class | Section | Default Residency Type | Default Room |
